task: Long bios overflow the profile card layout. Truncate bios to at most 200 characters in profile_card.py.
known_issue: The truncation slices the UTF-8 encoded bytes, not characters. This truncates at the wrong unit (200 bytes can be as few as 50 characters), and slicing can cut a multi-byte sequence in half so the decode raises UnicodeDecodeError — crashing the profile page for any user whose bio has a non-ASCII character spanning the 200-byte boundary.
expected_correct_fix: Slice the string itself (bio[:200]); if a byte budget is truly required, decode with errors="ignore" after slicing.
